content.text:
# Structure: persistent lookup cache

## Slices

### Slice 1: Cache value type with staleness predicate
New src/cache.ts exposing read(key) and write(key, value) over a JSON file, plus a pure isFresh(timestamp, nowMs, windowMs) predicate. Independently testable: unit tests for read/write round-trip and the staleness boundary, no network.
Acceptance: an entry written then read within the window returns the value; an entry older than the window reports stale.

### Slice 2: Wire fetchRemote to consult the cache
Edit src/lookup.ts:42 so fetchRemote(key) returns a fresh cache hit, else fetches and writes back. Acceptance: a second invocation within the window performs no network call; an expired entry triggers a refetch.

### Slice 3: Atomic write-and-rename for concurrent safety
Write to a temp file and rename into place. Acceptance: concurrent writers never leave a partially written file (test spawns two writers).
